name_cn:
【 packaging】
Medium size in stock!!️
Toujours Series, latest light apricot mixed with black from the brick cabinet, simply too beautiful, high-appeal bag, super soft color, super summer, oversized checkered design, paired with classic letter accessories, very modern and stylish, bag structure is soft, calf leather material feels premium, unique buckle that folds the side when fastened, capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items
size:28.5*19*21cm
